titleStmt.title: 351. Telegram From the Secretary of State to the to the Embassy in Brazil

div.head: 351. Telegram From the Secretary of State to the Embassy in Brazil Source: Department of State, Central Files, 732.5–MSP/12–1756. Confidential. Drafted by Siracusa, Bernbaum, and Sayre; cleared in draft with Phleger and Louis E. Frechtling of the Office of the Special Assistant to the Under Secretary for Mutual Security Affairs, in substance with Gray, and in final form by Murphy and Rubottom. Approved by Hoover.
div.p: Department understands these changes not in accordance your recommendation but believes after consultation with Department of Defense that there is no alternative.
